fields.RealMarketDataNode.symbols: Symbols to subscribe (e.g., AAPL, TSLA). If empty, uses input port value.
fields.RealMarketDataNode.stay_connected: Keep WebSocket connection alive between flow executions. True: maintains stream until explicit stop(). False: disconnects after single data fetch.
fields.RealMarketDataNode.fields: Fields to receive (price, volume, bid, ask)
fields.RealAccountNode.stay_connected: Keep WebSocket connection alive. True with ScheduleNode: stays alive during schedule wait. True without ScheduleNode: stays alive until explicit stop(). False: disconnects after each flow.
fields.RealAccountNode.product_type: Select product type. Fee fields will change based on selection.
fields.RealAccountNode.commission_rate: Overseas stocks trading commission rate (%). LS Securities default 0.25%
fields.RealAccountNode.tax_rate: Overseas stocks transaction tax rate (%). US 0%, HK 0.1%, JP 0%
fields.RealAccountNode.futures_fee_per_c: Futures fee per contract (USD, one-way). LS Securities default $7.5
fields.RealOrderEventNode.connection: Broker connection info. Add a BrokerNode first, then bind its connection output here.
fields.RealOrderEventNode.product_type: Select product type. Must match the product from BrokerNode.
fields.RealOrderEventNode.event_filter: Overseas stock event filter. Output all (AS0~AS4) or specific TR only.
fields.RealOrderEventNode.event_filter_f: Overseas futures event filter. Output all (TC1~TC3) or specific TR only.
fields.RealOrderEventNode.stay_connected: Keep WebSocket connection alive between flow executions.
fields.LogicNode.threshold: Threshold value (for at_least, at_most, exactly operators)
fields.NewOrderNode.product: Select product type. Must match the product selected in BrokerNode.
fields.NewOrderNode.order_type: Order type. Market order executes immediately, limit order places at specified price.
fields.NewOrderNode.market_code: [Overseas Stock] Select US market. Must match the market where the symbol is listed.
fields.NewOrderNode.price_type: [Overseas Stock] Quote type. LOO/LOC/MOO/MOC are special US market orders.
fields.NewOrderNode.exchange_code: [Overseas Futures] Exchange code. e.g., CME, EUREX
fields.NewOrderNode.expiry_month: [Overseas Futures] Expiry month in YYYYMM format.
fields.NewOrderNode.symbols: List of symbols to order. Bind symbols from ConditionNode.
fields.NewOrderNode.quantities: Quantities per symbol. Bind from PositionSizingNode.
fields.NewOrderNode.prices: Prices per symbol. Required for limit orders, ignored for market orders.
fields.PositionSizingNode.method: Choose how to determine the investment amount per symbol.
fields.PositionSizingNode.max_percent:
📊 [Fixed Percent] Percentage of account to invest per symbol. Example: 10 → invest 10% of account per symbol.

🛡️ [Kelly/ATR] Upper limit for calculated position size.
fields.PositionSizingNode.fixed_amount:
💰 Fixed amount to invest per symbol. Example: 10000 → always invest $10,000 per symbol.

💡 Binding tip: Connect AccountNode balance. Example: {{ nodes.account.balance }}
fields.PositionSizingNode.kelly_fraction:
🎲 Kelly formula adjustment (0.0~1.0).

Full Kelly (1.0) is highly volatile.

Recommended: 0.25 (Quarter Kelly) / 0.5 (Half Kelly) / 1.0 (Full Kelly, high risk)
fields.PositionSizingNode.atr_risk_perce:
📉 Account % to risk per ATR move.

ATR measures average price volatility. Position size is calculated to limit loss.

Example: 1.0 → if price drops by 1 ATR, lose only 1% of account.

Recommended: 0.5~2.0%
enum.PositionSizingNode.method.fixed_per: 📊 Fixed Percent - Invest X% of account
fields.ModifyOrderNode.original_order_id: Original order ID to modify. Select from open orders.
fields.ModifyOrderNode.new_quantity: New quantity. Leave empty to keep existing.
fields.ModifyOrderNode.new_price: New price. Leave empty to keep existing.
fields.CancelOrderNode.original_order_id: Original order ID to cancel. Select from open orders.
fields.LiquidateNode.mode: Liquidation mode. all: close all, symbol: specific symbols, losing: losing positions, profitable: profitable positions
fields.LiquidateNode.order_type: Liquidation order type. Market order recommended for emergency.
fields.LiquidateNode.positions: Position data. Bind from account node.
fields.HistoricalDataNode.start_date: Backtest start date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD or dynamic expression (e.g., dynamic:months_ago(3) = 3 months ago)
fields.HistoricalDataNode.end_date: Backtest end date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD or dynamic expression (e.g., dynamic:today() = today)
fields.HistoricalDataNode.adjust: Apply adjusted prices (split/dividend adjusted). Recommended for accurate backtesting.
fields.MarketDataNode.fields: Fields to query: price (current price), volume, ohlcv (candle data)
fields.MarketDataNode.period: Period for OHLCV data. Options: 1d (daily), 1h (hourly), 5m (5 minutes), 1m (1 minute)
fields.MarketDataNode.count: Number of data points to fetch for OHLCV
fields.SQLiteNode.db_path: SQLite DB file path. Relative path from workspace root.
fields.SQLiteNode.key_fields: Primary key fields for upsert operations
fields.SQLiteNode.aggregations: Aggregation functions per field. Options: max, min, sum, count, last, first, avg
fields.SQLiteNode.sync_interval_ms: DB sync interval in milliseconds. Lower value = more frequent writes.
fields.SQLiteNode.sync_on_change_count: Sync immediately when N changes occur
fields.PostgresNode.credential_id: PostgreSQL credential ID. Contains host, port, database, username, password.
fields.PostgresNode.key_fields: Primary key fields for upsert operations
fields.PostgresNode.aggregations: Aggregation functions per field. Options: max, min, sum, count, last, first, avg
fields.PostgresNode.sync_on_change_count: Sync immediately when N changes occur
fields.HTTPRequestNode.url: Request URL. Supports {{ }} expressions for dynamic values.
fields.HTTPRequestNode.query_params: URL query parameters. Click + to add key-value pairs.
fields.HTTPRequestNode.body: Request body for POST/PUT/PATCH. Automatically serialized to JSON.
fields.HTTPRequestNode.credential_id: Credential ID for authentication. Supports: http_bearer, http_header, http_basic, http_query
fields.HTTPRequestNode.headers: HTTP headers. Click + to add custom headers (e.g., Content-Type, X-API-Key).
fields.HTTPRequestNode.timeout_seconds: Request timeout in seconds. Request fails if no response within this time.
fields.HTTPRequestNode.retry_count: Number of retry attempts on failure. 0 = no retry.
outputs.common.error: Error message if an error occurred
outputs.BrokerNode.connection: Broker connection info. Connect to other nodes' connection input.
outputs.BrokerNode.paper_trading: Paper trading mode (true: paper, false: live)
outputs.RealMarketDataNode.data: Full market data (includes price, volume, bid, ask)
outputs.RealAccountNode.positions: Position details (symbol, qty, avg price, P&L, etc.)
outputs.RealOrderEventNode.event_filter: Currently filtering event (all or specific TR code)
outputs.ConditionNode.values: Calculated values used for condition (e.g., RSI, MACD)
errors.CREDENTIAL_NOT_SET: Credential is not set. Check BrokerNode's credential_id.
